getting_started.title: Getting Started
getting_started.description: Install ReEnd-Components into your React project in minutes. Available on npm as a public package.

step1.title: Step 1 — Install Package
step1.description: Install reend-components and its peer dependencies using your preferred package manager.
step1.peer_deps_note: These must be installed in your project (most React projects already have them):

cli_usage.title: CLI — Copy-Paste Workflow
cli_usage.description: Use the CLI to copy component source files directly into your project (shadcn-style). No runtime dependency on reend-components — you own the code.
cli_usage.vs_npm_desc: Import from reend-components. Gets updates automatically via npm. Best for most projects.
cli_usage.vs_cli_desc: Files copied to your components/ui/. Full control, zero runtime dep. Best for customization.
cli_usage.init_desc: Creates a reend-ui.json config file in your project root, setting the output directory for copied components.
cli_usage.add_desc: Copies component source files to your project. Also prints the peer dependencies you need to install.
cli_usage.list_desc: Shows all 62 available components. Filter by type with --core or --signature flags.
cli_usage.update_desc: Overwrites existing component files with the latest version from the registry.
cli_usage.note_desc: The CLI requires Node.js 18+ and works without installing reend-components as a project dependency. Run it anywhere with npx reend-ui.

step2.title: Step 2 — Configure Tailwind CSS
step2.description: ReEnd ships a Tailwind preset with the Endfield design system tokens. Add it to your config for seamless integration.
step2.preset_color_palette: Endfield color palette (ef-yellow, ef-blue, ef-red, ef-green, etc.)
step2.preset_semantic_tokens: Semantic tokens (background, foreground, primary, muted, etc.)
step2.preset_custom_fonts: Custom fonts (Saira, Chakra Petch, JetBrains Mono)
step2.preset_dark_mode: Dark mode support via class strategy

step3.title: Step 3 — Import Styles
step3.description: Import the CSS design tokens to get the Endfield visual language. Choose between CSS variables or the pre-built stylesheet.
step3.option_a_desc: Import the variables file in your global CSS. Works with any styling solution.
step3.option_b_desc: If you're not using Tailwind, import the pre-built CSS that includes all design tokens and base styles.
step3.note_desc: All color values use HSL without the wrapper, enabling alpha channel support:

step4.title: Step 4 — Use Components
step4.description: Import and use ReEnd components in your React application. All components are tree-shakeable and fully typed.

api_reference.title: API Reference
api_reference.description: Complete list of all exported components, utilities, and hooks available in reend-components.

exports.Button: Primary action button — 6 variants (primary/secondary/ghost/outline/danger/link), 5 sizes, loading state, asChild
exports.Card: Surface container — composable with CardHeader, CardMeta, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardBody, CardFooter
exports.CardHeader: Card header area with optional bottom border
exports.CardBody: Card content area with default padding
exports.CardFooter: Card footer area, typically holds actions
exports.Input: Text input — 3 variants, error/success/warning states, left/right icon slots
exports.Label: Form field label with required/optional marker
exports.HelperText: Input helper, error, or warning text displayed below field
exports.Textarea: Multi-line text area — same variants as Input, character counter
exports.Switch: Boolean toggle with square track, disabled state
exports.Select: Dropdown select — Radix-based with 10 sub-components (SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectGroup, etc.)
exports.Tabs: Tab navigation — 3 variants (underline/pill/bordered), keyboard support, Radix-based
exports.Accordion: Collapsible section — +/− Orbitron indicator, single/multiple modes, slide animation
exports.Breadcrumb: Navigation trail with › separator, aria-current on active item
exports.Pagination: Page navigation with getPageRange, ellipsis, PREV ◆/NEXT ◆
exports.Stepper: Step-by-step progress indicator — horizontal/vertical, currentStep, connector lines
exports.NumberInput: Numeric input with +/− step buttons, min/max/step, arrow key navigation, Orbitron display
exports.PopoverTrigger: Element that opens the Popover on click
exports.Dialog: Modal dialog — 5 size variants, backdrop-blur-sm, animate-dialog-in, focus-trapped
exports.DialogContent: Dialog panel with header, body, footer slots and close button
exports.Separator: Divider line — 5 style variants (default/subtle/strong/glow/accent), h/v orientation
exports.Timeline: Vertical event list — ◆/◇ node indicators, status variants
exports.TimelineItem: Single event entry within a Timeline
exports.Avatar: Square clip-corner avatar — 6 sizes, AvatarImage/AvatarFallback, ◆ status dot
exports.AvatarImage: Image slot inside Avatar with fallback support
exports.AvatarFallback: Initials/icon shown when AvatarImage fails to load
exports.Progress: Progress bar — 4 track variants, showLabel, shimmer animation
exports.SpoilerBlock: Content reveal with blur overlay — reveal button, aria-expanded, keyboard accessible
exports.SpoilerInline: Inline spoiler text with blur + click-to-reveal
exports.ThemeSwitcher: ◆/◇ dark/light mode toggle, persists to localStorage
exports.GlitchText: Animated glitch text effect — intensity/continuous, Orbitron font (Signature)
exports.TacticalPanel: Collapsible data panel — headerAction, scanline animation (Signature)
exports.HoloCard: Holographic shimmer card — interactive glow on hover (Signature)
exports.WarningBanner: Tactical warning strip with alert level (Signature)
exports.RadarChart: Polar area chart with axes/datasets/showLegend — requires framer-motion (Signature)
exports.TooltipTrigger: Element that triggers the tooltip on hover/focus
exports.TooltipProvider: Context provider for tooltip delay/skip settings
exports.Toast: Radix Toast notification with variant support
exports.ToastTitle: Title text within a toast notification
exports.ToastProvider: Context provider for Radix toast system
exports.SonnerToaster: Sonner-based toast container with Endfield styling
exports.useToast: Returns { toasts, toast, dismiss } for Radix toasts
exports.OperatorCard: Portrait 3:4 card with rarity diamonds, name, and faction (v1.1.0)
exports.LinkCard: Icon + title + arrow link card, wraps in <a> when href is set (v1.1.0)
exports.ViewToggle: Grid / List view toggle with optional localStorage persistence (v1.1.0)
exports.FilterBar: Filter bar with dropdown options and dismissible chips (v1.1.0)
exports.OTPInput: OTP/PIN input — Orbitron 48×56px boxes, auto-advance, paste, shake-on-error, success state, resend timer (v1.1.0)
exports.DatePicker: Full custom calendar picker — diamond clip-path selected day, month nav, TODAY/CLEAR, minDate/maxDate (v1.1.0)
exports.Rating: Diamond ◆/◇ rating with hover preview and keyboard navigation (v1.1.0)
exports.FileUpload: Drag-and-drop file upload zone with 8 visual states (v1.1.0)
exports.BottomSheet: Mobile bottom sheet with slide-up animation via portal (v1.1.0)
exports.Carousel: CSS scroll-snap carousel with ◆/◇ dot indicators (v1.1.0)
exports.PanelGroup: Panel group container — re-export from react-resizable-panels (v1.1.0)
exports.ResizeHandle: Styled ◆ resize handle with Endfield theme (v1.1.0)
exports.SessionTimeoutModal: Session expiry warning dialog with CountdownTimer (v1.1.0)
exports.RichTextEditor: Markdown WYSIWYG — toolbar (B/I/U/S/H1-H3/quote/list/link/divider), character counter, MARKDOWN/PREVIEW toggle (v1.1.0)
exports.CHART_COLORS: Array of 8 CSS var references for recharts palettes (v1.1.0)
exports.endfieldChartTheme: Recharts default props for Endfield typography and grid (v1.1.0)
exports.Footer: Footer container with brand bar and disclaimer note (v1.1.0)
exports.FooterColumn: Footer column with title and link list slot (v1.1.0)
exports.FooterLink: Footer link item with hover:text-primary and external support (v1.1.0)
exports.Table: Data table with sticky header, striped rows, sortable columns, empty slot (v1.1.0)
exports.TableHead: Sortable th cell with ▲/▼ primary-colored sort indicator (v1.1.0)
exports.TableRow: Table row with hover tint, selected state, and even-row striping (v1.1.0)
exports.TableCell: Standard td cell with Endfield typography and border styling (v1.1.0)
exports.TableEmpty: Empty state slot for zero-data tables (v1.1.0)
exports.List: Diamond bullet list — ◆ #FFD429 indicator, pl-5 padding (v1.1.0)
exports.ListItem: Single item within a diamond bullet List (v1.1.0)
exports.DescriptionList: Key-value description list — dt Orbitron uppercase, dd text-sm (v1.1.0)
exports.Stat: Stat/metric card — Orbitron 48px value, label, trend ▲/▼ (v1.1.0)
exports.StatGrid: Responsive auto-fit grid container for Stat cards (v1.1.0)
exports.SkeletonLine: Single shimmer line with width/height variants
exports.SkeletonText: Multi-line skeleton text block with configurable line count
exports.SkeletonCard: Composite card skeleton with optional avatar and body lines
exports.SkeletonTableRow: Table row skeleton with configurable column count
exports.EmptyState: Context-aware empty state — 8 preset variants, icon + title + CTA
exports.Alert: Persistent inline alert — 4 semantic variants, border-left accent, dismissible
exports.TopBanner: Sticky top-of-page announcement banner — #FFD429 bg, dismissible
exports.CopyClipboard: One-click copy button with ⎘ → ✓ confirmation feedback (v1.1.0)
exports.BackToTop: Fixed scroll-to-top button, appears after threshold (v1.1.0)
exports.ScrollProgress: Fixed top progress bar tracking page scroll position (v1.1.0)
exports.CookieConsent: Fixed bottom cookie consent banner with accept/customize actions (v1.1.0)
exports.CommandPalette: Cmd+K searchable command palette with keyboard navigation (v1.1.0)
exports.useCommandPalette: Hook for controlling CommandPalette open state (v1.1.0)
exports.useFocusTrap: Traps Tab/Shift+Tab keyboard navigation within a container ref — use for modals, drawers, dialogs
exports.useShortcut: Global keyboard shortcut hook with meta/ctrl/shift modifier support and cleanup on unmount
exports.useInView: IntersectionObserver hook — fires when element enters viewport, threshold/once/rootMargin, reduced-motion aware, SSR-safe
exports.UseInViewOptions: TypeScript type for useInView options (threshold, once, rootMargin, disabled)
exports.useStagger: Returns string[] of CSS delay values for staggering animation children (e.g. ['0ms','60ms','120ms'])
exports.Dropdown: Popover-based dropdown menu with groups, icons, and danger variant (v1.1.0)
exports.ContextMenu: Right-click context menu with shortcut display and portal rendering (v1.1.0)
exports.SortControl: Sort options row with tri-state cycling (asc/desc/none), ▲/▼ direction indicators (v1.1.0)
exports.PullToRefresh: Mobile pull-to-refresh — diamond spinner, 5-phase machine (idle→pulling→threshold→refreshing→complete), haptic feedback (v1.1.0)
exports.SwipeableItem: Touch-swipeable list item — left/right action reveal at 80px, auto-trigger at 160px, haptic feedback (v1.1.0)

theming.title: Theming & Customization
theming.description: Override design tokens to match your brand while keeping the Endfield visual language.
theming.dark_light_desc: Toggle .light class on your document root to switch modes. All tokens auto-update.

full_example.title: Full Project Example
full_example.description: A complete setup from scratch — new Vite + React project with ReEnd-Components integrated.
full_example.done_desc: Your app is now running with the Endfield design system. All components, design tokens, and animations are available. Visit the component sections in the sidebar to explore more components and usage patterns.
